items.title: Apple Music Top Songs (US)
items.summary: 1. Ella Langley – Choosin' Texas; 2. Drake – Janice STFU; 3. Lil Baby – Dead Fresh; 4. Ella Langley – Be Her; 5. Drake – Shabang; 6. Drake, Future & Molly Santana – Ran To Atlanta; 11. Future – California Girls; 12. Future – Konnichiwa; 13. Ariana Grande – hate that i made you love me; 14. Morgan Wallen – I'm The Problem; 15. Beyoncé – MORNING DEW (DONK)
